per_turn_leaks.student_message: And when these episodes occur, what does your body do?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: When these episodes happen, I start sweating pretty heavily and get this mild nausea feeling - it's like my stomach is turning a bit. The tightness in my chest gets worse too.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: During an episode, do you notice anything besides the main symptom?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I also get this numb tingling feeling in my left arm during the episodes when the chest tightness is really bad.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Specifically, any changes in your skin — like sweating or flushing?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: Yes, I sweat heavily during these episodes.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: And your stomach — any queasiness or nausea during these moments?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I experience mild nausea during these episodes, but no vomiting.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Now let's zoom out. Any swelling you've noticed anywhere on your body?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I have noticed some mild bilateral ankle swelling lately - my shoes feel tighter than usual when I take them off after a long day.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Now family history. Any medical problems run in your family?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My dad had a heart attack when he was 52 and passed away from it.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Specifically, has anyone in your family had serious or chronic conditions?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My father's heart attack at 52 was pretty tough on our family. He died shortly after.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: We've covered a lot. Is there anything we haven't discussed that you think is relevant?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I guess I didn't mention my cholesterol levels being high for a while now. My doctor told me it was an issue about a year ago, but I never followed up on getting them checked again after that.
